# Haven Chavous

> Personal portfolio of Haven A. Chavous — financial modeling, AI-enhanced analytics, and Excel expertise with 15+ years of experience.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, professional summary, capabilities, and industry experience.
- [Experience](/experience): Full-time roles and consulting engagements via Quanthaven Labs.
- [Excel Models](/excel-models): Downloadable financial models and dashboards.
- [Web Apps](/web-apps): Production financial tools and platforms.
- [Contact](/contact): Direct email and phone for consulting and collaboration.
